General.Name: ST George Mining Ltd
General.Description: St George Mining Limited engages in the exploration for mineral properties in Australia. The company primarily explores for lithium, nickel, copper, and base metal deposits, as well as gold and rare earth elements. St George Mining Limited was incorporated in 2009 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
